segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Hi, sorry, is this washer available?

segments.speaker: Neighbor
segments.text: Yeah, that one should be free.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. First time using these machines. Do they take coins or an app?

segments.speaker: Neighbor
segments.text: App only. The code is on the machine.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Got it. And do I add detergent here or directly with the clothes?

segments.speaker: Neighbor
segments.text: Use that drawer on the left.

segments.speaker: Neighbor
segments.text: No problem. The dryers are a little weak, so use extra time for towels.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Good tip. If a machine stops early, should I call the number on the wall?

segments.speaker: Neighbor
segments.text: Yeah, or tell the manager if it's during office hours.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Okay. I'm trying not to turn laundry into a whole incident.
